2606.06267.title: Many Circuits, One Mechanism: Input Variation and Evaluation Granularity in Circuit Discovery
2606.06267.paper_summary: Circuit discovery methods identify subgraphs that explain specific model behaviors, and structural differences between discovered circuits are commonly interpreted as evidence of distinct mechanisms. We test this assumption by varying input statistics while holding the task fixed, and show that the resulting structural differences exhibit apparent specialization but do not correspond to functional differences, a pattern we term phantom specialization. Using Literal Sequence Copying across four token-frequency bands plus a control condition in five Pythia models (70M-1.4B), we extract 75 circuits and find that structurally distinct circuits implement the same computation: band-specific edges transfer broadly across bands, a core shared across most bands recovers at least 99% of circuit performance, and causal interchange interventions confirm that internal representations are interchangeable across frequency bands. Repeated extractions within the same frequency band further suggest that discovery algorithms sample from an equivalence class of valid subgraphs rather than recovering a unique mechanism. Standard evaluation practice obscures this pattern: source-level evaluation inflates apparent faithfulness, while edge-level evaluation reveals the many-to-one mapping from structure to function. Our results show that structural differences between circuits are not sufficient evidence for distinct mechanisms, and that exposing this requires edge-level evaluation and cross-condition transfer tests.
2606.06267.paper_summary_zh: 電路發現方法識別解釋特定模型行為的子圖，發現的電路之間的結構差異通常被解釋為不同機制的證據。我們通過在固定任務的同時變化輸入統計來測試這一假設，並顯示出結果的結構差異表現出明顯的專門化，但並不對應於功能差異，這一模式我們稱之為幻影專門化。使用字面序列複製跨越四個標記頻率帶加上一個控制條件，在五個Pythia模型（70M-1.4B）中，我們提取了75個電路，並發現結構上不同的電路實現相同的計算：帶特定的邊緣在各個帶之間廣泛轉移，大多數帶共享的核心恢復了至少99%的電路性能，因果互換干預確認內部表示在頻率帶之間是可互換的。在同一頻率帶內的重複提取進一步表明，發現算法是從有效子圖的等價類中進行抽樣，而不是恢復唯一的機制。標準評估實踐掩蓋了這一模式：源級評估膨脹了表面上的忠實度，而邊緣級評估揭示了從結構到功能的多對一映射。我們的結果表明，電路之間的結構差異不足以作為不同機制的證據，並且揭示這一點需要邊緣級評估和跨條件轉移測試。
2606.06267.author: Alireza Bayat Makou et.al.
2606.06267.authors: Alireza Bayat Makou, Jingcheng Niu, Subhabrata Dutta, Iryna Gurevych
